Add chilled club soda to small Collins glass. Add remaining ingredients to mixing glass. 加冰并充分摇匀。 Strain into Collins glass. Stir briefly to integrate. 无装饰。

Add infused vodka to chilled Collins glass. Add large ice cubes and fill with club soda. Top with grenadine. Garnish with lemon peel and brandied cherry. Place all ingredients in airtight glass container for 7 days. Fine-strain and funnel back into bottle. Best if used within 3 months.

Add water and molasses to Old Fashioned glass and stir to combine. Add rum and stir to combine. Fill with crushed or pellet ice. Garnish with freshly grated nutmeg.
现磨肉豆蔻

火焰橙皮硬币 (optional) and 白兰地樱桃

Add all ingredients to airtight sealable plastic container and shake to combine. Place on shallow plate. Using fresh lemon wedge, moisten half of rim of glass and roll rim through the mixture. Fill with large ice cubes. Add all ingredients to mixing glass in order listed. Add large ice cubes and roll between mixing glass and shaker 3 to 5 times. Strain into prepared Collins glass. Garnish with ⅓ celery stalk and thin coin of carrot, notched to sit on nonrimmed side of glass.
⅓ celery stalk and thin coin of carrot, notched to sit on nonrimmed side of glass

Add all ingredients to mixing glass in order listed. Add large ice cubes and roll between mixing glass and shaker 3 to 5 times and transfer to chilled Collins glass. Place lemon wedge on side of glass. Garnish with ⅓ celery stalk. Optional garnish: prepare skewer with Peppadew (sweet pepper), cornichon (small French pickle), cocktail onion, and Queen Anne olive and place across top of glass.
⅓ celery stalk
